description: VERIFIED LIVE: Cloudflare via your logged-in dash.cloudflare.com session (session bridge — no API token). A broad read surface over the same-origin /api/v4: account, memberships, zones, per-zone DNS records + settings, and per-account Workers, Pages, R2 buckets, KV namespaces and Tunnels. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account — every endpoint below returned 200.

tools.name: cloudflare_user
tools.description: Your Cloudflare account (id, email, name). VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_memberships
tools.description: Your account memberships and roles. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_zones
tools.description: Your zones (domains). Note each zone's id + account id for the other tools. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_dns_records
tools.description: DNS records for a zone (pass the zone id from cloudflare_zones). VERIFIED.

params.name: type
params.description: Optional record type filter (A, CNAME, TXT…).

tools.name: cloudflare_zone_settings
tools.description: All settings for a zone (SSL mode, caching, security level…). VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_workers
tools.description: Worker scripts in an account (pass account id). VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_pages_projects
tools.description: Cloudflare Pages projects in an account. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_r2_buckets
tools.description: R2 object-storage buckets in an account. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_kv_namespaces
tools.description: Workers KV namespaces in an account. VERIFIED.

tools.name: cloudflare_tunnels
tools.description: Cloudflare Tunnels (cloudflared) in an account. VERIFIED.
